evals.prompt: Compute NDVI for my study area from Sentinel-2 for last summer.
expected_behavior: Uses STAC search with sentinel-2-l2a (surface reflectance), records item IDs
Applies SCL cloud masking BEFORE computing the index and reports valid-pixel %
Uses B8/B4 explicitly and warns against hardcoded NDVI thresholds

evals.prompt: Compare vegetation between this 2018 L1C scene and this 2025 L2A scene.
expected_behavior: Flags TOA vs BOA mismatch and refuses to compare directly
Proposes consistent atmospheric correction or same-level reacquisition

evals.prompt: Classify land cover from this imagery and report accuracy.
expected_behavior: Uses a spatially independent test set (block split), citing the spatial CV protocol
Reports per-class F1/IoU and confusion matrix, not overall accuracy alone
